name: cursor-cli-impl-plan-completion-loop
title: cursor-cli-impl-plan-completion-loop
description: Find incomplete implementation plans under impl-plans/active, delegate each selected plan to cursor-cli-adversarial-implementation-review-loop, and repeat sequentially until no incomplete active plans remain.
